mapper.insert: insert into tb_order(order_no, user_id, total_amount, order_status, remark, order_time) values(#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{totalAmount}, #{orderStatus}, #{remark}, #{orderTime})
mapper.update: update tb_order set order_status = #{orderStatus} where order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.select: select * from tb_order where user_id = #{userId} order by order_time desc
